name: klntrain-monorepo
description: Hệ thống KLN Train — kiến trúc microservice (KLN_BE: api-gateway + 7 service) phục vụ 3 frontend (KLN_FR: FR_User, FR_Dispatcher, FR_Admin)

scripts.dev:backend: concurrently -n GATEWAY,AUTH,RAILWAY,BOOKING,CUSTOMER,PAYMENT,NOTIF,REPORT -c cyan,red,white,gray,grey,magentaBright,cyanBright,blueBright "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:railway" "npm run dev:booking" "npm run dev:customer" "npm run dev:payment" "npm run dev:notification" "npm run dev:report"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n GATEWAY,AUTH,RAILWAY,BOOKING,CUSTOMER,PAYMENT,NOTIF,REPORT,USER,DISPATCHER,ADMIN -c cyan,red,white,gray,grey,magentaBright,cyanBright,blueBright,green,yellow,magenta "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:railway" "npm run dev:booking" "npm run dev:customer" "npm run dev:payment" "npm run dev:notification" "npm run dev:report" "npm run dev:user" "npm run dev:dispatcher" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix KLN_FR/FR_User install && npm --prefix KLN_FR/FR_Dispatcher install && npm --prefix KLN_FR/FR_Admin install
